free_text: Total Cross Sections of Neutrons on Deuterium in the
Electrons on water cooled tantalum target
Errors given are statistical errors only
Tabulated data received from Stoler, August 1973.
Updated to new date formats, lower case.
Neutron beam filtered with 8 inch iron filter needed to
reduce background contamination of data. Filtered beam
run made with carbon sample, results agreed with
